allow: Bash("C:/laragon/bin/mysql/mysql-8.4.3-winx64/bin/mysql.exe" -u root --protocol=TCP -e "ALTER USER 'app'@'%' IDENTIFIED WITH caching_sha2_password BY 'secret'; FLUSH PRIVILEGES;" 2>&1)
Bash("C:/laragon/bin/mysql/mysql-8.4.3-winx64/bin/mysql.exe" -u root --protocol=TCP -e "SELECT user, host, plugin FROM mysql.user;" 2>&1)

Bash("C:/laragon/bin/mysql/mysql-8.4.3-winx64/bin/mysql.exe" -u root --protocol=TCP -e "CREATE USER IF NOT EXISTS 'app'@'127.0.0.1' IDENTIFIED WITH caching_sha2_password BY 'secret'; CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS \\`app\\`; GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON \\`app\\`.* TO 'app'@'127.0.0.1'; FLUSH PRIVILEGES;" 2>&1)
Bash("$MYSQL" -u root --protocol=TCP -e "CREATE USER IF NOT EXISTS ''app''@''127.0.0.1'' IDENTIFIED WITH caching_sha2_password BY ''secret'';")
Bash("$MYSQL" -u root --protocol=TCP -e "CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS app CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;")
Bash("$MYSQL" -u root --protocol=TCP -e "GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON app.* TO ''app''@''127.0.0.1'';")
Bash("$MYSQL" -u root --protocol=TCP -e "CREATE USER IF NOT EXISTS ''app''@''localhost'' IDENTIFIED WITH caching_sha2_password BY ''secret'';")
Bash("$MYSQL" -u root --protocol=TCP -e "GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON app.* TO ''app''@''localhost'';")
Bash("$MYSQL" -u root --protocol=TCP -e "INSERT INTO app.doctrine_migration_versions \(version, executed_at, execution_time\) VALUES \(''DoctrineMigrations\\\\Version20260309120000'', NOW\(\), 0\);")
Bash("$MYSQL" -u root --protocol=TCP -e "SELECT version FROM app.doctrine_migration_versions ORDER BY executed_at DESC LIMIT 5;")
Bash("$MYSQL" -u root --protocol=TCP -e "DELETE FROM app.doctrine_migration_versions WHERE version = ''DoctrineMigrationsVersion20260309120000'';")
